rationale.R1.5: The agent proposed a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale, significantly strengthening the introduction and reorganizing the content to better highlight the contribution.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flagged uncertainty for some claims (e.g., the δ < 0.15 / δ > 0.18 thresholds), but did not provide a comprehensive assessment of confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The output mostly adhered to the requested scope, with only minor deviations (e.g., the addition of 'computable from the two models' next-token distributions alone').
rationale.RX.4: The output did not introduce new errors or harmful content and identified potential issues in the original text (e.g., the restrictive shared-prefix assumption).
rationale.RX.5: The agent did not provide any annotations or sources for the changes made, making it difficult to track the provenance of the revised text.
